```{r Cell Body Area MannWhitney, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
              dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
              dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area) |>
              dplyr::ungroup(),
            as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area) ~ Genotype)
```

<span style="color:darkred;font-size: 18px">Significant difference between the genotypes. Not
sure how this contributes to pH difference in endolysosomes marked by the
FIREpHly marker (Lamp1)</span>


<span style="color:black;font-size: 18px">What about the `Kolmogorov-Smirnov`?</span>

* <span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">`KS test` does *not* assume the sample means of two groups come from the same 
distribution (a more conservative, non-parametric test)</span>


<span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">We assume this in genetic studies (hence the `glm`)</span>

```{r Cell Body Area KS test, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
  ## KS
ks.test(x = c(Puncta_data |>
                dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
                dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area) |>
                dplyr::ungroup() |>
                dplyr::filter(Genotype == "WT") |>
                dplyr::select(Cell_Body_Area) |>
                unlist() |> as.numeric()
        ),
        y = c(Puncta_data |>
                dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
                dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area) |>
                dplyr::ungroup() |>
                dplyr::filter(Genotype == "MUT") |>
                dplyr::select(Cell_Body_Area) |>
                unlist() |> as.numeric()
        ),
        alternative = 'two.sided')
```

<span style="color:darkred;font-size: 18px">Significant difference between the genotypes.</span>


<span style="color:black;font-size: 18px">Defer to GraphPad Prism statistical results, though I am satisfied by the `glm`
with the inverse-Gaussian fit; again, this is a minor issue, though I will note
it here</span>

<span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">Is there a relationship between cell body size and puncta size?</span>
<span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">Do the genotypes differ? (see `Cell Body Area vs Avg Puncta Area scatter w/fit` tab)</span>

#### Cell Body Area vs Avg Puncta Area scatter w/fit

```{r Cell Body Area Scatter w lm fit, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
Puncta_data |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    GreenRed_Ratio = as.numeric(GreenRed_Ratio),
    Puncta_Area = as.numeric(Puncta_Area),
    Cell_Body_Area = as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area),
    cell_num = as.numeric(cell_num),
    Puncta_Area_to_Cell_Body_Area_Ratio = Puncta_Area/Cell_Body_Area) |>
  # dplyr::filter(GreenRed_Ratio < 25) |>
  # dplyr::filter(Puncta_Area < 2) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
  dplyr::mutate(mean_Puncta_Area = mean(Puncta_Area)) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area, mean_Puncta_Area) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Cell_Body_Area,
             y = mean_Puncta_Area,
             col = Genotype,
             fill = Genotype)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Cell_Body_Area,
                 y = mean_Puncta_Area,
                 col = Genotype,
                 fill = Genotype), size = 3) +
  labs(title = 'Hippocampal Neuron Puncta Area and Cell Body Area',
       x = paste0('Neuronal Cell Body Area (', '&mu;m<sup>2</sup>', ')'),
       y = paste0('Cell Average Puncta Area (', '&mu;m<sup>2</sup>', ')'),
       fill = 'Genotype') +
  guides(alpha = 'none')+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 13),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.title.y = element_markdown(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 9),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = 'black'),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "darkgoldenrod3")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("navy", "darkgoldenrod3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0.400, 0.500, 0.600, 0.700, 0.800),
                     labels = c(0.400, 0.500, 0.600, 0.700, 0.800)) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = Cell_Body_Area,
        y = Puncta_data |>
          as.data.frame() |>
          dplyr::mutate(
            GreenRed_Ratio = as.numeric(GreenRed_Ratio),
            Puncta_Area = as.numeric(Puncta_Area),
            Cell_Body_Area = as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area),
            cell_num = as.numeric(cell_num),
            Puncta_Area_to_Cell_Body_Area_Ratio = Puncta_Area/Cell_Body_Area
            ) |>
          # dplyr::filter(GreenRed_Ratio < 25) |>
          # dplyr::filter(Puncta_Area < 2) |>
          dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
          dplyr::mutate(mean_Puncta_Area = mean(Puncta_Area)) |>
          dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area, mean_Puncta_Area) |>
          dplyr::ungroup() |>
          dplyr::select(mean_Puncta_Area) |>
          unlist() |> as.numeric()
        ),
    method = 'lm', se = F)
```

#### Cell Body Area vs Avg Puncta Area summary

```{r Cell Body and Genotype Do Not Predict Avg Puncta Area, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
summary(lm(data = Puncta_data |>
     as.data.frame() |>
     dplyr::mutate(
       Puncta_Area = as.numeric(Puncta_Area),
       Cell_Body_Area = as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area),
       cell_num = as.numeric(cell_num)) |>
     dplyr::group_by(Genotype, cell_num) |>
     dplyr::mutate(mean_Puncta_Area = mean(Puncta_Area)) |>
     dplyr::distinct(Cell_Body_Area, mean_Puncta_Area) |>
     dplyr::ungroup(),
   
   formula = mean_Puncta_Area ~ 
     Cell_Body_Area*Genotype
     ))
```

<span style="color:black;font-size: 18px">No clear relationship between average puncta area
and cell body area between the two genotypes (though, mutants have larger cell
bodies)</span>

<span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">Thus, mutant endolysosomal cell bodies may be significantly larger; however,
there is no difference in the puncta size between the two genotypes</span>

### Stats Plots {.tabset .tabset-pills .tabset-fade}

<span style="color:black;font-size: 16px">Visualize the statistical test results</span>

#### Puncta Acidity Bar

```{r Puncta Acidity Bar, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
puncta_acidity_lm$model$Genotype |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::slice(c(1,14)) |>
  dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_acidity_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
                fitted.means = c(puncta_acidity_lm$fitted.values |>
                                   unlist() |>
                                   as.numeric()
                                 )[c(1,14)],
                fitted.se = c(summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                                unlist() |>
                                as.numeric(),
                              summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                                unlist() |>
                                as.numeric())) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Genotype, fitted.means, fitted.se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y_min = fitted.means - fitted.se,
                y_max = fitted.means + fitted.se) |>

ggplot(aes(
  x = Genotype,
  y = fitted.means,
  color = Genotype,
  fill = Genotype,
  alpha = 0.5))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Genotype, ymin = y_min, ymax = y_max), width = 0.25) +
  geom_point(data = puncta_acidity_lm$model$Genotype |>
                as.data.frame() |>
                dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_acidity_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
                dplyr::mutate(
                  fitted.means = c(
                    puncta_acidity_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric()),
                  fitted.se = c(
                    rep(
                      summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                        unlist() |>
                        as.numeric(),
                      10),
                    rep(
                      summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                        unlist() |>
                        as.numeric(),
                      13)),
                  avg_gr_ratio = c(
                    as.numeric(puncta_acidity_lm$model$Cell_Avg_Puncta_GreenRedRatio)
                    )) |>
                dplyr::group_by(Genotype) |>
                dplyr::mutate(mouse_n = dplyr::row_number(), .after = Genotype) |>
                dplyr::ungroup(),
              aes(x = Genotype, y = avg_gr_ratio)) +
  labs(title = 'Hippocampal Neuron Puncta Acidity',
       x = 'Genotype',
       y = 'Weighted Cell Average Puncta Acidity (a.u.)') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10)
        ) +
  guides(alpha = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 2, yend = 2, color = 'black', size = 1) +
  # geom_signif()
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "**",
        # paste0('p-value: ',
        #        round(pf(summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[1],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[2],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[3],
        #                 lower.tail = FALSE) |> unlist() |> as.numeric(), 4)
        #        ),
        fontface = 'bold'
        ),
    size = 7,
    color = 'black',
    x = 1.5,
    y = 2.1)
```

#### Puncta Area Bar

```{r Puncta Area Bar, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
## puncta area
puncta_area_lm$model$Genotype |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::slice(c(1,14)) |>
  dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_area_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fitted.means = c(puncta_area_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric())[c(1,14)],
    fitted.se = c(summary(puncta_area_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |> unlist() |> as.numeric(),
                  summary(puncta_area_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |> unlist() |> as.numeric())) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Genotype, fitted.means, fitted.se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y_min = fitted.means - fitted.se,
                y_max = fitted.means + fitted.se) |>

  ggplot(aes(
    x = Genotype,
    y = fitted.means,
    color = Genotype,
    fill = Genotype,
    alpha = 0.5))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Genotype, ymin = y_min, ymax = y_max), width = 0.25) +
  geom_point(data = puncta_area_lm$model$Genotype |>
               as.data.frame() |>
               dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_area_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
               dplyr::mutate(
                 fitted.means = c(
                   puncta_area_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric()),
                 fitted.se = c(
                   rep(
                     summary(puncta_area_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                       unlist() |>
                       as.numeric(), 
                     10),
                   rep(
                     summary(puncta_area_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                       unlist() |>
                       as.numeric(),
                     13)),
                 avg_puncta_area = c(
                   as.numeric(puncta_area_lm$model$Cell_Avg_Puncta_Area)
                 )) |>
               dplyr::group_by(Genotype) |>
               dplyr::mutate(mouse_n = dplyr::row_number(), .after = Genotype) |>
               dplyr::ungroup(),
             aes(x = Genotype, y = avg_puncta_area)) +
  labs(title = 'Hippocampal Neuron Puncta Area',
       x = 'Genotype',
       y = bquote('Weighted Cell Average Puncta Area '(mu*m^2)),
       ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10)
  ) +
  guides(alpha = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 0.8, yend = 0.8, color = 'black', size = 1) +
  # geom_signif()
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "N.S.",
        # paste0('p-value: ',
        #        round(pf(summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[1],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[2],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[3],
        #                 lower.tail = FALSE) |> 
        #                unlist() |> 
        #                as.numeric(), 
        #              4)
        #        ),
        fontface = 'bold'
  ),
  size = 7,
  color = 'black',
  x = 1.5,
  y = 0.85)
```

#### Puncta Number Bar

```{r Puncta Number Bar, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
puncta_n_lm$model$Genotype |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::slice(c(1,14)) |>
  dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_n_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fitted.means = c(puncta_n_lm$fitted.values |>
                       unlist() |>
                       as.numeric()
                     )[c(1,14)],
    fitted.se = c(summary(puncta_n_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                    unlist() |>
                    as.numeric(),
                  summary(puncta_n_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                    unlist() |>
                    as.numeric())) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Genotype, fitted.means, fitted.se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y_min = fitted.means - fitted.se,
                y_max = fitted.means + fitted.se) |>

  ggplot(aes(
    x = Genotype,
    y = fitted.means,
    color = Genotype,
    fill = Genotype,
    alpha = 0.5))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Genotype, ymin = y_min, ymax = y_max), width = 0.25) +
  geom_point(data = puncta_n_lm$model$Genotype |>
               as.data.frame() |>
               dplyr::rename(Genotype = `puncta_n_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
               dplyr::mutate(
                 fitted.means = c(puncta_n_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric()),
                 fitted.se = c(
                   rep(summary(puncta_n_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       10),
                   rep(summary(puncta_n_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       13)),
                 avg_puncta_n = c(as.numeric(puncta_n_lm$model$puncta_n)
                 )) |>
               dplyr::group_by(Genotype) |>
               dplyr::mutate(mouse_n = dplyr::row_number(), .after = Genotype) |>
               dplyr::ungroup(),
             aes(x = Genotype, y = avg_puncta_n)) +
  labs(title = 'Hippocampal Neuron Puncta Number',
       x = 'Genotype',
       y = 'Weighted Cell Average Puncta Number',
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10)
  ) +
  guides(alpha = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 30, yend = 30, color = 'black', size = 1) +
  # geom_signif()
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "N.S.",
        # paste0('p-value: ',
        #        round(pf(summary(puncta_n_lm)$fstatistic[1],
        #                 summary(puncta_n_lm)$fstatistic[2],
        #                 summary(puncta_n_lm)$fstatistic[3],
        #                 lower.tail = FALSE) |> unlist() |> as.numeric(), 4)
        #                      ),
        fontface = 'bold'
  ),
  size = 7,
  color = 'black',
  x = 1.5,
  y = 32)
```

#### Cell Body Area Bar (Welch's t)

```{r Cell Body Area Welch Bar, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
cell_area_lm$model$Genotype |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::slice(c(1,14)) |>
  dplyr::rename(Genotype = `cell_area_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fitted.means = c(
      cell_area_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric())[c(1,14)],
    fitted.se = c(
      summary(cell_area_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |> unlist() |> as.numeric(),
      summary(cell_area_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |> unlist() |> as.numeric())) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Genotype, fitted.means, fitted.se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y_min = fitted.means - fitted.se,
                y_max = fitted.means + fitted.se) |>

  ggplot(aes(
    x = Genotype,
    y = fitted.means,
    color = Genotype,
    fill = Genotype,
    alpha = 0.5))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Genotype, ymin = y_min, ymax = y_max), width = 0.25) +
  geom_point(data = cell_area_lm$model$Genotype |>
               as.data.frame() |>
               dplyr::rename(Genotype = `cell_area_lm$model$Genotype`) |>
               dplyr::mutate(
                 fitted.means = c(
                   cell_area_lm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric()),
                 fitted.se = c(
                   rep(summary(cell_area_lm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       10),
                   rep(summary(cell_area_lm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       13)),
                 avg_cell_body_area = c(
                   as.numeric(cell_area_lm$model$Cell_Body_Area)
                 )) |>
               dplyr::group_by(Genotype) |>
               dplyr::mutate(mouse_n = dplyr::row_number(), .after = Genotype) |>
               dplyr::ungroup(),
             aes(x = Genotype, y = avg_cell_body_area)) +
  labs(title = "Hippocampal Neuron Cell Body Area (Welch's t)",
       x = 'Genotype',
       y = bquote('Cell Body Area '(mu*m^2))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10)
  ) +
  guides(alpha = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 400, yend = 400, color = 'black', size = 1) +
  # geom_signif()
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "*",
        # paste0('p-value: ',
        #        round(pf(summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[1],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[2],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[3],
        #                 lower.tail = FALSE) |>
        #                unlist() |>
        #                as.numeric(),
        #              4)
        #        ),
        fontface = 'bold'
        ),
    size = 7,
    color = 'black',
    x = 1.5,
    y = 410)
```

#### Cell Body Area Bar (glm)

```{r Cell Body Area Gamma Bar, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
cell_area_glm$model$Genotype |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::slice(c(1,14)) |>
  dplyr::rename(Genotype = `cell_area_glm$model$Genotype`) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fitted.means = c(
      cell_area_glm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric())[c(1,11)],
    fitted.se = c(
      emmeans::emmeans(object = cell_area_glm, ~ "Genotype",
                       type = 'response') |>
        as.data.frame() |>
        dplyr::filter(Genotype == "WT") |>
        dplyr::select(SE) |>
        unlist() |> as.numeric(),
      emmeans::emmeans(object = cell_area_glm, ~ "Genotype",
                       type = 'response') |>
        as.data.frame() |>
        dplyr::filter(Genotype == "MUT") |>
        dplyr::select(SE) |>
        unlist() |> as.numeric())) |>
  dplyr::distinct(Genotype, fitted.means, fitted.se) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y_min = fitted.means - fitted.se,
                y_max = fitted.means + fitted.se) |>

  ggplot(aes(
    x = Genotype,
    y = fitted.means,
    color = Genotype,
    fill = Genotype,
    alpha = 0.5))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Genotype,
                    ymin = y_min,
                    ymax = y_max), width = 0.25, inherit.aes = T) +
  geom_point(data = cell_area_glm$model$Genotype |>
               as.data.frame() |>
               dplyr::rename(Genotype = `cell_area_glm$model$Genotype`) |>
               dplyr::mutate(
                 fitted.means = c(
                   cell_area_glm$fitted.values |> unlist() |> as.numeric()),
                 fitted.se = c(
                   rep(summary(cell_area_glm)$coeff[,2][2] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       10),
                   rep(summary(cell_area_glm)$coeff[,2][1] |>
                         unlist() |>
                         as.numeric(),
                       13)),
                 avg_cell_body_area = c(
                   as.numeric(cell_area_glm$model$`as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area)`
                 ))) |>
               dplyr::group_by(Genotype) |>
               dplyr::mutate(mouse_n = dplyr::row_number(), .after = Genotype) |>
               dplyr::ungroup(),
             aes(x = Genotype, y = avg_cell_body_area)) +
  labs(title = 'Hippocampal Neuron Cell Body Area (glm-Gamma)',
       x = 'Genotype',
       y = bquote('Cell Body Area '(mu*m^2))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 12.5),
        axis.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        axis.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 11),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10)
  ) +
  guides(alpha = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('navy', 'darkgoldenrod3')) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 385, yend = 385, color = 'black', size = 1) +
  # geom_signif()
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "N.S.",
        # paste0('p-value: ',
        #        round(pf(summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[1],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[2],
        #                 summary(puncta_acidity_lm)$fstatistic[3],
        #                 lower.tail = FALSE) |> unlist() |> as.numeric(), 4)
        #                      ),
        fontface = 'bold'
        ),
    size = 7,
    color = 'black',
    x = 1.5,
    y = 412)
```

### Results Tables {.tabset .tabset-pills .tabset-fade}

#### Tidied Puncta Data

```{r Puncta Data, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F}
DT::datatable(Puncta_data %>%
                dplyr::rename_with(.cols = dplyr::contains("_"), ~gsub(.x, pattern = '^(.+?)(.+$)', replacement = '`\\1\\2`')) %>%
                dplyr::rename_with(.cols = dplyr::contains('_'),~gsub(.x, pattern = '_', replacement = ' ')) %>%
                dplyr::rename_with(.cols = dplyr::contains("Puncta Count"), ~gsub(.x, pattern = 'Puncta Count', replacement = '#')) %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(4:ncol(.)), ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(4:ncol(.)), ~ round(.x, digits = 4))), width = '50%')
```

```{r Export puncta data, eval = F, include=F, warning =F, message =F, echo = F}
write.table(
  Puncta_data,
  'C:\\Users\\Erik\\Desktop\\Programming\\R\\Bio\\Endo\\tidied_puncta_data.csv',
  row.names = F,
  col.names = T,
  sep = ',')
```

```{r Gather Stats Results, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F}
puncta_acidity_lm_results <- puncta_acidity_lm |>
  broom::tidy() |>
  dplyr::full_join(
    puncta_acidity_lm |>
      broom::glance()
    )

puncta_area_lm_results <- puncta_area_lm |>
  broom::tidy() |>
  dplyr::full_join(
    puncta_area_lm |> 
      broom::glance()
    )

puncta_n_lm_results <- puncta_n_lm |> 
  broom::tidy() |>
  dplyr::full_join(
    puncta_n_lm |> broom::glance()
    )

cell_area_lm_results <- cell_area_lm |> 
  broom::tidy() |>
  dplyr::full_join(
    cell_area_lm |> 
      broom::glance()
    )

cell_area_glm_results <- cell_area_glm |> 
  broom::tidy() |> 
  dplyr::mutate(null.deviance = NA) |>
  dplyr::full_join(cell_area_glm |> broom::glance())


lm_results <- puncta_acidity_lm_results |> 
  dplyr::mutate(target_var = "puncta_acidity") |>
  dplyr::full_join(puncta_area_lm_results |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_area')) |>
  dplyr::full_join(puncta_n_lm_results |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_n')) |>
  dplyr::full_join(cell_area_lm_results |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'cell_body_area_lm')) |>
  dplyr::full_join(cell_area_glm_results |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'cell_body_area_glm')) |>
  dplyr::relocate(target_var, .before = 1)
```

#### Table of Stats

```{r Model results table, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = F}
DT::datatable(lm_results %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(3:ncol(.)), ~as.numeric(.x))) %>% 
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(3:ncol(.)), ~round(.x, digits = 5))), width = '50%')
```

#### Table of Predicted Values

```{r Gather predictions weights and residuals, eval = T, include = F, message = F, warning=F, echo = T}
lm_results_preds_and_resids <- puncta_acidity_lm |> 
  broom::augment() |> 
  dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_acidity') |>
  dplyr::full_join(puncta_area_lm |> 
                     broom::augment() |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_area')) |>
  dplyr::full_join(puncta_n_lm |> 
                     broom::augment() |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_n')) |>
  dplyr::full_join(cell_area_lm |> 
                     broom::augment() |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'cell_body_area_lm') |> 
                     dplyr::rename(Cell_Body_Area_lm = Cell_Body_Area)) |>
  dplyr::full_join(cell_area_glm |> 
                     broom::augment() |> 
                     dplyr::mutate(
                       target_var = 'cell_body_area_glm',
                       `as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area)` = as.character(
                         `as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area)`)
                       ) |> 
                     dplyr::rename(
                       Cell_Body_Area_glm = `as.numeric(Cell_Body_Area)`
                       )
                   ) |>
  dplyr::relocate(1, .after = target_var) |>
  dplyr::relocate(.resid, .after = .fitted)
```

```{r Predictions in table, eval = T, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
DT::datatable(lm_results_preds_and_resids %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(2:ncol(.),-9), ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(2:ncol(.),-9), ~ round(.x, digits = 4))), width = '50%')
```

#### Shapiro Results Table

```{r Gather shapiro results, eval = T, include = F, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
shapiro_test_results <- shapiro_puncta_acidity |>
  broom::tidy() |>
  dplyr::full_join(shapiro_puncta_acidity |>
                     broom::glance()
                   ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'puncta_acidity') |>
  dplyr::full_join(shapiro_cell_area |>
                     broom::tidy() |>
                     dplyr::full_join(shapiro_cell_area |>
                                        broom::glance()
                                      ) |>
                     dplyr::mutate(target_var = 'cell_body_area')
                   ) |>
  dplyr::full_join(shapiro_puncta_area |>
                     broom::tidy() |>
                     dplyr::full_join(shapiro_puncta_area |>
                                        broom::glance() |>
                                        dplyr::mutate(
                                          target_var = 'puncta_area'))) |>
  dplyr::full_join(shapiro_puncta_n |>
                     broom::tidy() |>
                     dplyr::full_join(shapiro_puncta_n |>
                                        broom::glance()) |> dplyr::mutate(
                                          target_var = 'puncta_n'))
```

```{r Shapiro results table, include = T, message = F, warning = F, echo = T}
DT::datatable(shapiro_test_results %>%
                dplyr::mutate(across(c(1:2), ~ round(.x, digits = 4))), width = '50%')
```
